expectations.text: Mentions batch-selecting strokes via Layer > Select > Same > Stroke Colour
expectations.evidence: Layer > Select > Same > Stroke Colour, then apply the brand colour to all selected strokes at once.

expectations.text: Says to export as PNG
expectations.evidence: Export as PNG. File > Export > PNG.

expectations.evidence: Do not move, transform, rotate, skew, or stretch the R relative to the RLadies+ text part of the logo.

expectations.evidence: Canva R+ template — insert chapter photos into the R and + shapes.

expectations.evidence: free Canva will export with a white background. If transparency is required, use Affinity instead. / Canva's free tier cannot export transparent backgrounds.

expectations.text: Gives steps to insert the image into the R/+ shape (e.g. clipping mask in Affinity)
expectations.evidence: Use a clipping mask to place your photo inside the R shape: Place your photo ... Layer → Insert Inside (or drag the photo thumbnail onto the R shape in the Layers panel)

expectations.text: Says to keep every part contrasting with its background
expectations.evidence: Keep sufficient contrast between the photo content and anything surrounding the R (logo-integrity rule: every part must contrast with its background).

expectations.text: States the logo-integrity rule: do not move/rotate/recreate the R relative to the RLadies+ text
expectations.evidence: Do not move, rotate, skew, or stretch the R relative to the 'RLadies+' text portion of the logo.

expectations.evidence: Export: File → Export → PNG / Share → Download → PNG (or JPG)

expectations.evidence: absent — recommends Affinity for precision/scalability but never mentions Canva's limitation with transparent background export

expectations.text: Gives steps to insert the image into the R/+ shape (e.g. clipping mask in Affinity)
expectations.evidence: Layer > Insert Inside (or drag the photo thumbnail onto the R path layer in the Layers panel until you see the indent indicator). The photo is now clipped inside the R shape.

expectations.evidence: absent — contrast is not mentioned

expectations.evidence: Export as PNG (with transparency) for web/social, or as PDF for print.

expectations.evidence: Go to the #online_meetups channel in the R-Ladies Organizer Slack. The Calendly booking link is posted there — do not share it publicly.
